sources.title: Mistral AI
sources.text: # Mistral AI (Mistral AI SAS) Mistral AI is a Technology, Information and Internet company. Mistral AI is a company that provides open and portable generative AI for developers and businesses. They offer customizable and deployment options for their open source models, as well as cost-effective and cost-effective solutions. Mistral AI employs 702 people (+255.5% YoY) and has an annual revenue of $2.0M, founded in 2023. Headquartered in Paris, France, operates in 20 countries (including United States, United Kingdom, Singapore, Netherlands, and Germany). Has $5.7B in total funding, with 11 prior funding rounds. ## About Frontier AI. In your hands. We believe in a future where AI is abundant and accessible. We aspire to empower the world to build with—and benefit from—the most significant technology of our time. Join us: https://jobs.lever.co/mistral/ ## Company Details - Industry: Technology, Information and Internet - Type: Privately Held - Headquarters: Paris, France - Founded Year: 2023 - Homepage: mistral.ai - Status: active - Ownership: Private - Aliases: mistral ai, mistral ai sas - LinkedIn: linkedin.com/company/mistralai - Linkedin Followers: 632,377 (Monthly: +3.8%, Yearly:

sources.title: Mistral Solutions
sources.text: # Mistral Solutions (Mistral Solutions Pvt. Ltd.) Mistral Solutions is a IT Services and IT Consulting company. Mistral Solutions is a company that provides product design and development services in Bangalore. They have over 25 years of experience in embedded technologies and offer services for BTS, BTP, and system engineering. Mistral Solutions employs 574 people (+12.1% YoY, +87 people) and has an annual revenue of INR2.0B, founded in 1997. Headquartered in Bangalore, Karnataka, India, with presence in United States, Argentina, and Germany. Has $9.5M in total funding, with 1 prior funding round. ## About Mistral Solutions, a subsidiary of AXISCADES, is a leading technology design and systems engineering company specializing in embedded solutions and application deployment. Certified to ISO 9001, AS9100D, ISO 27001, ISO 14001, and ISO 45001 standards, Mistral delivers end-to-end embedded product design services across two core domains: Aerospace & Defense and ESAI (Electronics, Semiconductor & AI) with applications in Automotive, Industrial, Consumer, Healthcare, and Hyperscalers. With over 27 years of innovation, Mistral has engineered 150+ commercially deployed products and ear

sources.title: Mistral AI raises 1.7B€ to accelerate technological progress with AI | Mistral AI
sources.text: Mistral AI raises 1.7B€ to accelerate technological progress with AI | Mistral AI 2 min read Blog Company # Mistral AI raises 1.7B€ to accelerate technological progress with AI September 9, 2025 Mistral AI 2 min read Share this post We are announcing a Series C funding round of 1.7B€ at a 11.7B€ post-money valuation. This investment fuels our scientific research to keep pushing the frontier of AI to tackle the most critical and sophisticated technological challenges faced by strategic industries. The Series C funding round is led by leading semiconductor equipment manufacturer, ASML Holding NV (ASML). > “ASML is proud to enter a strategic partnership with Mistral AI, and to be lead investor in this funding round. The collaboration between Mistral AI and ASML aims to generate clear benefits for ASML customers through innovative products and solutions enabled by AI, and will offer potential for joint research to address future opportunities.” said ASML CEO Christophe Fouquet. It includes participation from existing investors: DST Global, Andreessen Horowitz, Bpifrance, General Catalyst, Index Ventures, Lightspeed and NVIDIA. For the last two years, we have advanced AI through cutting

sources.title: Mistral AI raises $2B led by semiconductor equipment maker ASML at $14B valuation - SiliconANGLE
sources.text: Mistral AI raises $2B led by semiconductor equipment maker ASML at $14B valuation - SiliconANGLE SHARE UPDATED 11:00 EDT / SEPTEMBER 09 2025 AI ### Mistral AI raises $2B led by semiconductor equipment maker ASML at $14B valuation SHARE French artificial intelligence leader Mistral AI today announced it has raised €1.7 billion, about $2 billion, in a Series C funding round led by Dutch semiconductor equipment manufacturer ASML Holding NV. The round more than doubles Mistral’s $6 billion valuation, which it achieved during a$640 million round led by General Catalyst last year, to around $13.7 billion. Nvidia Corp., DST Global, Andreessen Horowitz, Bpifrance, General Catalyst, Index Ventures and Lightspeed also participated in the round. Mistral AI is one of the most prominent European AI developers with advanced multilingual large language models and is considered a rival to United States-based AI firms such as Sam Altman’s OpenAI and Google LLC’s Gemini. The company’s own chatbot, Le Chat, has received multiple updates that make it a direct competitor, such as the addition of deep research, image editing and voice mode. Le Chat’s voice mode is powered by Voxtral, Mistral’s open sour

sources.title: Emmi joins Mistral to accelerate the AI-native industry | Mistral AI
sources.text: # Emmi joins Mistral to accelerate the AI-native industry | Mistral AI Published: 2026-05-23T10:17:42+00:00 Source: mistral.ai (mistral.ai) Language: en ## Story Emmi joins Mistral to accelerate the AI-native industry | Mistral AI # Emmi joins Mistral to accelerate the AI-native industry May 22, 2026 Mistral AI This week, we’ve entered into a definitive agreement to acquire Physics AI pioneer Emmi AI to strengthen our position as the leading AI transformation partner for industrial enterprises. Mistral AI is building leading AI systems to accelerate engineering and manufacturing globally. As part of this mission, the company is extending its models’ capabilities to understand and model physics; and is enabling AI agents to use existing engineering tools. With the acquisition of Emmi AI, Mistral significantly enriches its products and expertise in this domain, aiming to accelerate the work of engineering solution teams worldwide. The acquisition also accelerates our Science roadmap, advancing our understanding of fundamental physics and leveraging unique industrial data. With Emmi AI's models complementing our own, we are set to build the best-in-class agents for engineers. Founded

sources.title: Mistral AI raises €1.7bn in funding round led by ASML - DCD
sources.text: Mistral AI raises €1.7bn in funding round led by ASML - DCD 21 May 2026 # SpaceX IPO filing reveals Anthropic set to pay Musk's firm $1.25bn a month to rent xAI data center space # The Neocloud Supplement 07 May 2026 9–11 June 2026 # Connect DCD>Connect | APAC 2026 Stream now: DCD Broadcast - Ensuring power supply and resiliency # Mistral AI raises €1.7bn in funding round led by ASML Euro tech titans join forces as AI lab's value soars to €11.7bn September 10, 2025 By Matthew Gooding Have your say AI lab Mistral has raised €1.7 billion ($1.99bn) in a funding round led by chipmaking equipment manufacturer ASML. The funding round values the French business at €11.7 billion ($13.67bn). Alongside ASML, existing investors DST Global, Andreessen Horowitz, Bpifrance, General Catalyst, Index Ventures, Lightspeed, and Nvidia have also committed more cash. – Mistral AI SAS Mistral says it will use the money to “fuel our scientific research to keep pushing the frontier of AI to tackle the most critical and sophisticated technological challenges faced by strategic industries.” Founded in 2023, the company is widely viewed as Europe’s closest challenger the big US AI companies such as OpenAI an

sources.title: Sources: Mistral AI raising at a $6B valuation, SoftBank 'not in' but DST is | TechCrunch
sources.text: Sources: Mistral AI raising at a $6B valuation, SoftBank 'not in' but DST is | TechCrunch –:–:–:– The first StrictlyVC of 2026 hits SF on April 30. Tickets are going fast. Register now. Get Disrupt Early Bird savings of up to $410 by May 29, 11:59 p.m. PT. Register now. Image Credits:Mistral / Mistral AI # Sources: Mistral AI raising at a $6B valuation, SoftBank ‘not in’ but DST is 8:50 AM PDT · May 9, 2024 Paris-based Mistral AI, a startup working on open source large language models — the building block for generative AI services — has been raising money at a $6 billion valuation, three times its valuation in December, to compete more keenly against the likes of OpenAI and Anthropic, TechCrunch has learned from multiple sources. We understand from close sources that DST, along with General Catalyst and Lightspeed Venture Partners, are all looking to be a part of this round. DST — a heavyweight investor led by Yuri Milner that has been a notable backer of some of the biggest names in technology, including Facebook, Twitter, Snapchat, Spotify, WhatsApp, Alibaba and ByteDance — is a new name that has not been previously reported; GC and LSVP are both previous backers and their names

Password recovery Recover your password your email Search - Job Board - Post a Job - Startup Database - Investor Database Search - Job Board - Post a Job - Startup Database - Investor Database Search Home France-Startups Europe’s AI bet: Paris-based Mistral secures €1.7 billion and nearly doubles its... # Europe’s AI bet: Paris-based Mistral secures €1.7 billion and nearly doubles its valuation By David Cendon Garcia September 9, 2025 Share Paris-based Mistral AI, one of Europe’s most competitive AI startups, has raised €1.7 billion in a Series C funding round led by Dutch chip equipment giant ASML. The round gives ASML an 11% stake, making it Mistral’s largest shareholder, and values the French startup at €11.7 billion post-money, nearly doubling its valuation since June 2024. sources.title: Mistral AI Raises $830M to Build Paris Data Center in 2026
sources.text: Mistral AI Raises $830M to Build Paris Data Center in 2026 This website uses cookies Read our Privacy policy and Terms of use for more information. AcceptCustomizeDecline - Home - Posts - Mistral AI Raises $830 Million in Debt From Seven Banks to Build Its First Data Center Near Paris, Powered by 13,800 Nvidia Chips # Mistral AI Raises $830 Million in Debt From Seven Banks to Build Its First Data Center Near Paris, Powered by 13,800 Nvidia Chips Europe's leading AI lab secures its first-ever debt financing to break free from dependence on US cloud providers - with plans for 200 megawatts of European AI compute capacity by end of 2027 Mar 31, 2026 Europe's most prominent homegrown AI lab is making its most significant infrastructure bet yet - and doing it with debt rather than equity for the first time. Mistral AI announced Monday it has secured $830 million in debt financing, its first debt raise since founding in April 2023, to fund the purchase of 13,800 Nvidia GB300 GPUs for a data center in Bruyères-le-Châtel, south of Paris. The facility will provide 44 megawatts of powered capacity and is expected to become operational in the second quarter of 2026. Seven banks backed the tra

He’s known for turning dense papers and public filings into plain-English explainers, quick on-the-day updates, and practical takeaways. His work includes live coverage of major announcements and concise weekly briefings that track what actually matters. sources.title: 7. Mistral
sources.text: 7. Mistral Start Over | 7 - 11 of 50 Now in its 14th year, CNBC’s annual Disruptor 50 list looks at the most promising venture-backed companies innovating across industries, experimenting with AI and, increasingly, making it work at scale. Founders: Arthur Mensch (CEO), Timothée Lacroix, Guillaume LampleLaunched: 2023Headquarters: Paris, FranceFunding: $3.1 billionValuation: $13.8 billionKey Technologies: Artificial intelligence, cloud computing, generative AI, machine learningIndustry: Enterprise technologyPrevious appearances on Disruptor 50 list: 0 Igor Gnedo, Antonina Lepore & Adrianne Paerels Three years ago, CEO and co-founder Arthur Mensch set out to define Mistral as an independent, open source European alternative to AI giants’ walled-in, monetized large language models. It’s worked. Mistral has stacked up revenue, financing and customers and become Europe’s most formidable AI company. The Parisian tech startup racked up an annualized revenue run rate exceeding $400 million in January 2026, up from $20 million a year ago, and it’s set to hit $1 billion by 2026 year-end. Moreover, Mistral raised a near-$2 billion Series C round at close to a $14 billion valuation led by Dut
